person_entity_missing.title: {user_name}: linked person entity no longer exists

confirm.title: Clear the broken person entity link?
confirm.description:
Person entity `{person_entity}` linked to **{user_name}** no longer exists. Auto-assignment still works — the location filter ignores broken links and falls back to weight-only matching — but the configured location signal isn't doing anything.

This will clear the link from the profile. You can link to a different person entity later from **Configure** if you want.

person_entity_unknown.title: {user_name}: linked person has no location
person_entity_unknown.description:
User **{user_name}** is linked to person entity `{person_entity}`, but that person has no working device trackers, so its state is `unknown`. Auto-assignment continues using weight matching — the link doesn't actively cause a problem — but location-based filtering for this user is effectively disabled until a tracker is assigned.

Fix it by either:

- Going to **Settings → People**, opening `{person_entity}`, and assigning a device tracker to it (typically the user's phone via the Home Assistant companion app), **or**
- Going to **Settings → Devices & Services → Multi-User Scale Router → Configure** and clearing the **Person Entity** field on this user's profile if you don't plan to set up a tracker.

confirm.title: Remove stale notification target?
confirm.description:
Home Assistant doesn't know about the notify service `{service}` that's configured for **{user_name}**. Actionable notifications sent to it are being silently dropped — usually because the companion app was removed from the phone or the device was renamed.

This will remove `{service}` from the profile. The integration will reload so the change takes effect immediately. You can re-add a notification target later from **Configure** if needed.

user.title: Multi-User Scale Router
user.description: Choose the source weight sensor and detection settings.

add_first_user.title: Add User Profile
add_first_user.description: Add a user profile to this router. Enable the toggle below if you want to keep adding users after saving this one.

abort.already_configured: A router for this sensor is already configured.
abort.no_sensor_entities: No weight sensor entities were found. Please set up your scale first, then add the Multi-User Scale Router.

error.duplicate_person_entity: That person is already linked to another user.

add_user.title: Add User Profile
add_user.description: Add another user profile to this router.

edit_user.title: Edit User
edit_user.description: Choose a user profile to edit.

remove_user.title: Remove User
remove_user.description: Select a user profile to remove. This also deletes that user's routed measurement history.

router_settings.title: Detection Settings
router_settings.description: Update the source sensor and detection settings.

abort.cannot_remove_last_user: At least one user must remain configured.

error.duplicate_person_entity: That person is already linked to another user.

assign_measurement.name: Assign measurement
assign_measurement.description: Manually assign a pending weight measurement to a specific user when automatic routing is ambiguous.

measurement_id.name: Measurement ID
measurement_id.description: The measurement ID of the pending measurement to assign (shown in the notification).

user_id.name: User ID
user_id.description: The unique ID of the user to assign the measurement to.

reassign_measurement.name: Reassign measurement
reassign_measurement.description: Reassign a user's measurement to a different user. If no measurement ID is provided, the newest measurement is reassigned.

from_user_id.name: From User ID
from_user_id.description: The unique ID of the user to take the measurement from.

to_user_id.name: To User ID
to_user_id.description: The unique ID of the user to assign the measurement to.

measurement_id.name: Measurement ID
measurement_id.description: The measurement ID of the specific measurement to reassign. If omitted, the most recent measurement will be used.

remove_measurement.name: Remove measurement
remove_measurement.description: Remove a measurement from a user's history. By default removes the newest measurement, or specify a measurement ID to remove a specific measurement.

user_id.name: User ID
user_id.description: The unique ID of the user to remove the measurement from.

measurement_id.name: Measurement ID
measurement_id.description: The measurement ID of the specific measurement to remove. If not provided, removes the newest measurement.
